caption: The video shows a close-up of hands holding a small booklet with colorful pages, set against a blurred background featuring a red fabric and a white object, possibly a vase or container. The hands appear to be gently flipping through the pages of the booklet. Subtitles on the screen convey a message about providing support to people who have lost everything, emphasizing that this approach is both the first and last thing we should do, and that it is truly effective. The scene suggests a moment of reflection or discussion about compassionate actions, possibly in a setting related to aid or support for those in need.
